name: yt-dlp-webui
description: Self-hostable yt-dlp download server with web interface and optional Docker packaging

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/build-pages.js && node --check scripts/build-release.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run pages:build
